opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia Covers waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: My $800 sofa looked destroyed — this $47 cover fixed it in 5 min
opportunities.before_state: Faded, pet-hair-covered, clawed-up sofa that embarrasses guests and feels impossible to clean
opportunities.after_state: Crisp, fitted, waterproof sofa that looks brand new and wipes clean in seconds
buyer_intent_keywords: couch cover that stays in place
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning season + Mother's Day week (May 10) drives peak sofa-refresh searches, and Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes every sale high-value.

opportunities.specific_product: modular hanging closet organizer with shelf dividers
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned a chaotic closet into a boutique in 20 min for $34
opportunities.before_state: Overstuffed closet with clothes on the floor, nothing findable, doors that can barely close
opportunities.after_state: Color-coded, double-hung, drawer-sectioned closet that looks like a Container Store display
opportunities.why_now: May is peak spring-cleaning momentum — closet content is surging across Pinterest and Reels as people finish bedroom refreshes before summer.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm Original Side Sleeper Pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Woke up without neck pain for the first time in years — $89 pillow did it
opportunities.before_state: Waking up stiff, neck aching, stacking flat pillows that flatten overnight and ruin sleep
opportunities.after_state: Contoured support that holds all night — deeper sleep, no morning stiffness, fully refreshed
opportunities.why_now: Mother's Day (May 10) makes this a top gifting pick — 'gift mom better sleep' hooks perform extremely well in the 7-day window before the holiday.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia bamboo expandable drawer organizer set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Spent $38 on this — my kitchen drawer went from junk pile to perfect in 10 min
opportunities.before_state: Overflowing junk drawer with tangled utensils, duplicate tools, and zero organization
opportunities.after_state: Sectioned, clean bamboo drawer with every tool visible, accessible, and intentionally placed
opportunities.why_now: Spring kitchen cleanouts are peaking in May and Syruvia's 20% commission plus strong visual contrast makes this a high-ROI Reel with broad search volume.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products upholstered accent arm chair
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $179 chair turned my dead corner into the coziest reading nook
opportunities.before_state: Empty or cluttered corner collecting boxes and bags, making the whole room feel unfinished
opportunities.after_state: Styled reading nook with a plush chair, throw, and lamp — room finally looks intentional and complete
opportunities.why_now: Pre-summer home refresh spending is up and 'dead corner makeover' is a high-engagement Reels format — Best Choice Products' 15% commission on a $179 item yields strong payout per conversion.
